summary: Comprehensive testing of DevGrill AI Interview Platform completed. Backend APIs 100% functional, frontend working with minor UI/UX issues. All core features including JWT auth, Monaco editor, timed mode, session comparison, weak topics analytics, and bookmarks are operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Tech stack button data-testid format inconsistent (uses dashes instead of expected format)
ui_bugs.workaround: Can click by text content instead

passed_tests: GET /api/auth/me returns user data with cookies
Session creation with timed_mode and time_per_question fields
Question generation via Gemini AI integration
Answer evaluation with scoring and feedback
Landing page loads with hero and categories
Navbar shows SIGN IN when not logged in
Navbar shows user name when logged in
Login page loads with email/password form
Register page loads with name/email/password form
Setup page has timer mode toggle and selections
Interview room loads with question generation
Report page shows session details with share/print buttons
